sections.paragraph:
Legends »Holiness to the Lord«
- Engraved on the high priest's mitre
Exo 28:36; Exo 39:30
- Engraved on bells of horses, on pots and bowls
Zec 14:20
»This is Jesus, the King of the Jews«
Mat 27:37
Precepts written on door posts and gates, and worn on the hand and forehead
Deu 6:9; Deu 11:20; Isa 57:8
